g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can a Student do in the automated leave system?')
sendPrompt('What can Faculty do in the automated leave system?')
sendPrompt('What full control does Admin have?')
sendPrompt('What pages does the frontend need for the automated leave system?')
g.text: Login · My Leaves · Submit Form · Admin Dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does JWT auth work for both student and faculty?')
sendPrompt('How does role-based middleware work for student and faculty?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the Leave Submit module expose?')
sendPrompt('What does the Admin module let the admin override?')
sendPrompt('What analytics does the dashboard module return?')
sendPrompt('What does the Auth module handle?')
sendPrompt('How does a PostgreSQL trigger fire the automation engine?')
sendPrompt('What rules does the rule engine check before calling AI?')
sendPrompt('What rejection reasons does the rule engine produce?')

sendPrompt('What happens when the AI approves a leave?')
sendPrompt('What DB tables are updated when a leave is auto-decided?')
